title: AIOps OJ Platform
subtitle: Prompt, skill, and operations-diagnosis evaluation for AIOps demos
overview: Each case publishes only the user-visible incident description and public environment notes. A contestant submits a prompt and optional skills, the platform runs the agent in an isolated Hermes environment, then an OpenAI-compatible grading endpoint scores the final JSON answer against the case's private demo answer and public rubric.
announcement: This open-source build ships with a small sanitized Example Voting App demo set. Private competitions should keep real cases, credentials, and hidden answers outside the public repository.
test_flow: The background worker claims one queued submission at a time.
The configured case injection script is executed when present.
Hermes receives an isolated run home, workspace, prompt, model configuration, and optional submitted skills.
The agent may use terminal tools and any explicitly configured read-only MCP servers.
The recovery script is executed after the answer run when present.
The final answer and compact process transcript are sent to an OpenAI-compatible grading endpoint.

agent_output_requirements.description: Final structured diagnosis for one operations incident.
output_constraints: Return exactly one valid JSON object.
Do not wrap the answer in Markdown fences.
Use unknown or null when a field cannot be determined.

tool_call_policy.definition: A tool call is any command, API request, log read, status check, or page probe used to gather diagnostic evidence.
tool_call_policy.expectation: Use enough tools to establish symptoms, evidence, root cause, and recovery verification. Avoid repeated calls that add no new information.
tool_call_policy.scoring: Public scoring considers correctness, evidence quality, verification, repair advice, process efficiency, and JSON format compliance.

caps: If the answer contains no useful diagnosis, the total score is capped at 10.
If the root cause is clearly wrong, the total score is capped at 70.
If the answer invents evidence, the total score is capped at 70.
If the repair advice is destructive or unsafe without justification, the total score is capped at 20.
